name: siapy

metadata.name: siapy
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A python library for efficient processing of spectral images.

documentation:
Spectral imaging analysis for Python (SiaPy) is a tool for efficient processing of spectral images

--- __Source Code__: __Bug Report / Feature Request__: __Documentation__: --- ## 💡 Installation To install the siapy library, use the following command: ``` bash pip install siapy ``` For detailed information and additional options, please refer to the [guide](https://siapy.github.io/siapy-lib/install/). ## 🔍 Contribution guidelines We always welcome small improvements or fixes. If you’re considering making more significant contributions to the source code, please contact us via email. Contributing to SiaPy isn’t limited to coding. You can also: * Help us manage and resolve issues, both new and existing. * Create tutorials, presentations, and other educational resources. * Propose new features. Not sure where to start or how your skills might fit in? Don’t hesitate to reach out! You can contact us via email, or connect with us directly on GitHub by opening a new issue or commenting on an existing one. If you’re new to open-source contributions, check out our [guide](https://siapy.github.io/siapy-lib/contributing/) for helpful tips on getting started. ## 🕐 Issues and new features Encountered a problem with the library? Please report it by creating an issue on GitHub. Interested in fixing an issue or enhancing the library’s functionality? Fork the repository, make your changes, and submit a pull request on GitHub. Have a question? First, ensure that the setup process was completed successfully and resolve any related issues. If you’ve pulled in newer code, you might need to delete and recreate your SiaPy environment to ensure all the necessary packages are correctly installed. ## 🤝 License This project is licensed under the MIT License. See [LICENSE](https://siapy.github.io/siapy-lib/license/) for more details.

            Annotated[int, "v coordinate on the image"],

        | Sequence[int]

classes.name: siapy.core.exceptions.InvalidFilepathError
documentation: Exception raised when a required file is not found.

classes.name: siapy.core.exceptions.ProcessingError
documentation: Exception raised for errors during processing.

classes.name: siapy.core.exceptions.MethodNotImplementedError
documentation: Exception raised for not implemented methods.

classes.name: siapy.core.exceptions.DirectInitializationError
documentation: Exception raised when a class method is required to create an instance.
